summary: Verified iteration 171 fixes: Refresh Legal Refs feature for Appeal Case Manager. The new POST /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/refresh-legal-refs endpoint works correctly, returning updated/total counts. Law_sections now contain SUBSTANTIVE legislation (Crimes Act 1900, Evidence Act 1995, Crimes (Sentencing Procedure) Act 1999, Criminal Procedure Act 1986) instead of generic Criminal Appeal Act references. No placeholder text found in law_sections. Frontend shows 'Refresh Legal Refs' button with RefreshCw icon on Grounds tab. All 99 tests pass (93 legislation framework + 6 new tests).
critical_code_review_comments: verify.py correctly does NOT default state to 'nsw' - uses case.get('state', '') or ''
verify.py injects state-specific legislative framework via _build_state_framework_context()
verify.py has enhanced cleaning that strips: Criminal Appeal Act entries, placeholder text ('Act name', 'Relevant Act', 'section specific to'), entries without real section numbers
classify.py also asks for law_sections at classification time with same cleaning logic
New endpoint POST /cases/{case_id}/grounds/refresh-legal-refs re-verifies all grounds and updates law_sections
Frontend CaseDetail.jsx has handleRefreshLegalRefs handler and 'Refresh Legal Refs' button with RefreshCw icon

success_rate.backend: 100% (99/99 tests passed - 93 legislation framework + 6 new iteration 171 tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Refresh Legal Refs button visible and functional, ground cards show substantive law_sections)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 171 verified: (1) POST /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/refresh-legal-refs endpoint returns 200 with {updated, total, message}. (2) NSW case (case_6cc234434cbd) grounds now have substantive law_sections like Crimes Act 1900 s 23A, Evidence Act 1995 s 137, Crimes (Sentencing Procedure) Act 1999 s 21A. (3) No placeholder text in law_sections. (4) Criminal Appeal Act only appears in appellate_pathway field, not law_sections. (5) verify.py no longer defaults state to 'nsw'. (6) Frontend 'Refresh Legal Refs' button visible on Grounds tab with RefreshCw icon.
